purpose: Static, read-only portfolio control center for tracking NYCIF repositories as one master project.
security_note: This file is published through a public GitHub Pages site. Do not include secrets, private operational data, unpublished credentials, tokens, or sensitive private repo contents.

recommended_secure_options: Cloudflare Access in front of a custom admin domain
Netlify password protection or identity gate
Private internal dashboard outside GitHub Pages

master_project.name: NYCIF Master Project
master_project.blocker_summary: The dashboard is static. Status is manually snapshotted until each repo publishes a safe status artifact.
master_project.next_action: Define one safe status JSON artifact per repo, then update this master dashboard from those artifacts.
